name: Potato Soup with Roast Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cloves of garlic and roast them in 1 tablespoon of the olive oil in a moderately hot oven, 190°C/375°F, for 15...20 minutes, until they are just golden and soft but not brown.
2. Peel and quarter the onion, peel and slice the carrots, scrub (but do not peel) the potatoes and cut them into 2.5 cm (1 in) thick cubes.
3. Boil all the vegetables together for about 15 minutes in the water with 1 teaspoon of sea salt until the carrots and potatoes are soft.
4. Add the roast garlic cloves and their residual oil to the vegetables, cool slightly and blend.
5. Season with pepper and stir in 2 tablespoons of olive oil into the soup before serving.
